para_trans: Hon'ble Deputy Chairman, Maharashtra Legislative Council
On the distribution of government bungalows to them

Reference: - Government Decision, No.-Shaniva-1520 / Q. 15/23 -A, D. January 09, 2020
Mr. Sachin Mohan Ahir, Hon'ble Deputy Speaker, Maharashtra Legislative Council, Vidhan Bhavan, Mumbai
The government decided to allot the government bungalow "A-6 (Raigad)" Madam Cama Marg, Mumbai
(2) The Hon'ble Deputy Speaker shall, on his retirement from office in accordance with the provisions of the relevant Government Decision, be deemed to have
It will be mandatory to vacate the allotted accommodation within a period of fifteen days.
The Government decision is available on the Government of Maharashtra website www.maharashtra.gov.in.
